working_on: Routine task P5-10: Service nodes seed (formal-logic primitives, math prerequisites, history terminators) — fourteenth routine-mode session against T-PHASE-5; depends_on [P5-01a] satisfied since S-0050. P5-10 is the single-task service-node tier per phase_5.md T1-B (the cross-subject foundational concepts that several philosophy subdomains require but that no single subject owns canonically); range per phase_5.md T2-A is 0050-0059. Author 0050_seed_services_part1.sql in the 0050-0059 sub-range; ROUTING.md per-session narrative entry. Apply via engine/tools/apply_migration.py wrapper (sixth routine-mode load-bearing exercise per ADR 0055; first was S-0066, second was S-0068, third was S-0070, fourth was S-0071, fifth was S-0073 including the wrapper's first routine-mode exit-3 SQL-error path); verify with engine/tools/check_target.py --task-id P5-10 and engine/tools/validate.py.
declared_scope: Author product/seed-graph/migrations/0050_seed_services_part1.sql with 25 service-node concepts at the granularity principle, all confidence_level INTERPRETED and domain[]={'service'}. Three sub-clusters: (A) formal-logic primitives — 10 nodes (truth_value, bivalence_principle, argument_logical, validity_logical, soundness_logical, inference_rule, modus_ponens, modus_tollens, formal_proof, counterexample); (B) math prerequisites — 8 nodes (set_mathematical, function_mathematical, axiom_mathematical, quantifier, probability_mathematical, conditional_probability, bayes_theorem, expected_value); (C) history terminators — 7 nodes (presocratic_naturalism, greek_atomism, aristotelian_four_causes, scholasticism, renaissance_mechanism, vienna_circle_logical_positivism, hegelian_dialectic). 28 within-service pedagogical_prerequisite edges total: formal-logic intra-cluster (11), math intra-cluster (8), history intra-cluster (5), service-to-service bridges (4 — axiom_mathematical → formal_proof; aristotelian_four_causes/renaissance_mechanism/hegelian_dialectic → vienna_circle_logical_positivism). All within-service; no cross-domain edges (P5-11's exclusive responsibility per phase_5.md T2-G #1); no historical_influence edges; no new edge predicates. Append per-session narrative entry to product/seed-graph/migrations/ROUTING.md. Apply via engine/tools/apply_migration.py wrapper per ADR 0055. Confidence_level composition target: 100% INTERPRETED (matches the twelve prior P5 subject-subdomain seeds; floor is 70%). PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md not edited (only pedagogical_prerequisite). Pre-apply node-existence sweep against the seeded ~355 ids confirmed zero collisions; suffix discipline (_logical, _mathematical) used for nodes whose unsuffixed names collide with seeded concepts (truth, validity, function, relation are canonical-homed in language/epistemology/metaphysics). Two-commit pattern. End state: P5-10 complete in auto_target.json; check_target.py --task-id P5-10 passes both criteria (migration_applied + validate_passes). graph_version 14→15. Sub-range slots 0051-0059 left reserved. phase: P_5
